hypotheses.statement: Replication-protocol-bound research on Family A techniques produces effect sizes that are either statistically detectable but small or not detectable above baseline variance.
hypotheses.distinguishing_prediction: Pre-registered multi-site replication studies measure effect sizes consistent with this range.

hypotheses.statement: Family C techniques (no specified mechanism) will not produce statistically detectable effects under replication-protocol-bound testing.
hypotheses.distinguishing_prediction: Pre-registered tests of Family C techniques show effect sizes indistinguishable from null.

hypotheses.statement: Pilot deployment of any proposed technique authorized alongside research will produce farmer-harm outcomes without yield improvements.
hypotheses.distinguishing_prediction: Pilot-participating farmers at year 5 report higher cost-without-benefit ratios than matched controls.
